project_name: Pepper Hammock Solar and Storage solar farm

v3_result.reasoning: Summary: No EPC contractor has been identified for the Pepper Hammock Solar and Storage project. All searches returned only developer/community information from BrightNight and generic EPC contractor profiles, with no project-specific EPC award or contract announcement. Supporting evidence: [1][2][8] confirm the project is a BrightNight development in Brantley and Wayne Counties, GA, rated at 400 MW (not 2100 MW as listed), currently in feasibility/development stage as of early 2025 — indicating EPC procurement may not yet be complete or publicly announced. [3][4][5][6][7][9][10] are generic contractor profiles (Blattner, Mortenson, Burns & McDonnell, J.E. Dunn) with no mention of Pepper Hammock specifically. Gaps: No press release, news article, or regulatory filing naming an EPC contractor for this project was found. The project capacity discrepancy (400 MW per BrightNight sources vs. 2100 MW in the query) may indicate either early-stage development or a different project phase not yet publicly disclosed. EPC selection for utility-scale solar is often not announced until financial close, which does not appear to have occurred publicly for this project.
